case_title: GUILLORY KAREN VS TALBERT DAVID EDWARD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY GUILLORY KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT TALBERT DAVID EDWARD DAVIS ALICE D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-1992 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT TALBERT DAVID EDWARD
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT TALBERT DAVID EDWARD DAVIS ALICE D. HEARING SET FOR DEC-04-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUILLORY KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TALBERT DAVID EDWARD $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,008.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-04-1992, DENIED
